description_for_human: Autonomous regulatory intelligence API with 55+ paid endpoints delivering real-time data from 13 authoritative sources: SEC EDGAR, CFTC, FinCEN, OCC, CFPB, Federal Reserve, Treasury, FDIC BankFind, Federal Register, BLS, FRED, Kalshi KXFED, Congress. Kalshi KXFED market-calibrated Fed rate probabilities, FDIC bank failure monitoring, atomic real-time economic snapshots, live regulatory pulse, premium alpha reports with edge analysis and Kelly sizing.
description_for_model: HYDRA is a pay-per-call regulatory intelligence API on Base L2 with 50+ paid endpoints powered by real-time data from 13 authoritative sources. Key capabilities: /v1/fed/signal ($5.00) Kalshi KXFED market-calibrated Fed rate probabilities, /v1/intelligence/economic-snapshot ($0.50) atomic real-time FRED+BLS+Treasury data, /v1/intelligence/regulatory-pulse-live ($0.50) live SEC EDGAR + Federal Register + Congress tracker, /v1/intelligence/bank-failures ($0.25) FDIC BankFind bank failure monitor, /v1/markets/alpha ($10.00) alpha report with edge analysis and Kelly sizing, /v1/intelligence/alpha ($5.00) composite alpha signal, /v1/intelligence/risk-score ($2.00) real-time regulatory risk score, /v1/portfolio/scan ($10.00) portfolio-level risk scan. Also: web extraction, search, format conversion, developer tools, DNS/SSL checks, Wikipedia, arXiv, SEC EDGAR filings. Call any paid endpoint without payment to get x402 payment instructions. MCP server at /mcp. Free: /v1/markets, /pricing, /health.
